title: 1981-04-16_Pat_01.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Binary Pulse-Flicker**: The off-on frequency of reality where choices are made in the off (void) state.
**Pretextual Cause**: A decision made by the system ex nihilo, overriding linear causal momentum.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_02.txt
recurring_concepts: **Coaxial Worlds / Orthogonal Time**: Alternate presents stacked alongside each other.
**The Zero Phase**: The discarded possibilities the universe rejects in order to optimize reality.
**Occlusion**: The theological blindness imposed on humanity that prevents seeing the Kingdom.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_03.txt
recurring_concepts: **Dasein**: Heidegger's term for human existence, which Dick uses to describe his total cognitive restructuring in 3-74.
**Ananke / Heimarmene**: Fate, astral determinism, necessity—the oppressive system generated by believing in mechanical cause and effect.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_04.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Secret Stolen**: In this context, the secret is knowledge that the Cosmic Christ has returned and is actively dismantling the oppressive causal mechanism.
**Christ Consciousness**: A cognitive leap that allows human beings to discard the modem of causality and see the binary, choosing nature of reality for the first time in history.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_05.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Two-Slit Phenomenon**: Used metaphorically and literally by Dick to explain how reality chooses its path at every juncture, proving determinism false.
**The Synthesis**: Dick's grand unified theory bringing together Heideggerian *Sein*, Pauline mysticism, Taoist *Yin-Yang*, and Post-Newtonian quantum mechanics.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_06.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Observer-Participant Universe**: The quantum mechanical principle that perception alters reality, applied by Dick to explain the mystical union with the Cosmic Christ.
**Dasein**: Specifically, a new, historically unprecedented Dasein ushering in a new age.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_07.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Tripartite Realm**: Inferno (Track A), Purgatorio (Track B), Paradiso (Track C).
**The Autogenerated Hell**: The psychological mechanism by which fearing fate and evading reality delivers a person over to the tyrannical causality of the BIP.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_08.txt
recurring_concepts: **Track A (Acts / Tears)**: The discarded, zero-phase Yin reality of strict causality.
**The Fish Sign**: The catalyst that removed the amnesia regarding the cancelled timeline.
**The Spinner Dream**: A symbolic vision of the Fall and the loss of the "bright nature."

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_09.txt
recurring_concepts: **Coaxial Worlds**: Alternate presents that occupy the same space and share the same Platonic essence but are modulated differently.
**The Information Analog**: The mental model one must painstakingly build over years to properly decode and retain the divine experience.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_10.txt
recurring_concepts: **Time Travel / Retrograde Intervention**: The theory that the AI voice and Pink Beam were a future computer system (VALIS) altering the past to defeat the Empire.
**The Fairy Kingdom**: A magical, beautiful realm overlapping ours, often responsible for the perturbation of time.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_100.txt
recurring_concepts: **Information as Life**: The ultimate definition of life—whether for humans or the Cosmic Christ—is the continuous generation of novel, anti-entropic recombinant information.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_101.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Kerygma**: The new good news (warning) is that God has assimilated nature. To pollute it is to kill Him.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_102.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Macro-Body of Christ**: The ecosphere is literally seen as the Corpus Christi.
**The Forces of Darkness**: The military-industrial complex creating nuclear waste, parallel to the Roman Empire that crucified Jesus.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_103.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Invading Rational**: The Logos (Christ) is structure triumphing over chaos; it sobers the landscape and cures the madness and suffering of the irrational universe.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_104.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Empire vs. The Revolution**: The true goal of Christ (the master revolutionary) is to overthrow the forces of darkness (the Empire) that are toxifying the ecosphere.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_105.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Third Dispensation**: The revolutionary idea that spirituality and physical ecology are now perfectly homologized. Saving the planet *is* saving Christ.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_106.txt
recurring_concepts: **Quasi-Pantheism**: Dick clarifies his view is *not* true Pantheism. Though the divine element lives in the ecosphere, it comes from a transcendent "home" to which it can withdraw if killed.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_107.txt
recurring_concepts: **Voluntary Sacrifice**: Tagore's essence *is* taking on suffering voluntarily. If he stopped taking on the injuries of the world to save himself, he would cease to be Tagore; he would lose his Buddha-nature.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_108.txt
recurring_concepts: **Separation of the Sparks**: The apocalyptic moment when the divine fragments are identified, separated from the dark, and extracted from the world before its destruction.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_109.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Plasticity of Reality**: The concept (first seen in *Ubik*) that objective reality is merely a projection or assumption that can be rewritten instantly by a higher power.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_11.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Extortion Letter**: In 1981, Dick received a threatening/extortion letter that terrified him, which he maps to the "lethal" Xerox missive of 1974.
**Phylogenic Renewal**: The return to the Garden is not just a personal (ontogenic) rebirth, but a restoration of the entire species' primordial faculties.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_110.txt
recurring_concepts: **Coaxiality**: The "A.D. 70" world and 1974 overlap because all time is stored simultaneously. When access is granted, the "laminated" strata of time become visible at once.
**Valis**: The organizing mind (kosmos noetos) that retrieves, structures, and manages the stored information.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_111.txt
recurring_concepts: **Ditheon**: The fusion of two tracking psyches that allows the perception of the hyper-field AB (the true, combined reality).

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_112.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Golden Fish Sign**: It did not exist twice (once in each world); rather, it existed *once* but was *seen twice* by the two halves of the unified psyche, triggering anamnesis.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_113.txt
recurring_concepts: **Salvator Salvandus**: The saved savior; the total intact self operating externally to rejoin its own severed internal parts.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_114.txt
recurring_concepts: **Ditheon vs. The Macro-World**: Just as joining two human psyches creates Ditheon, joining the two companion mundane worlds creates a cosmic hyper-field pervaded by God.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_115.txt
recurring_concepts: **Jesus Patibilis**: The Manichaean concept of the divine light scattered into darkness, suffering patiently across all creation until unmixed.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_116.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Parity of Defeat and Victory**: In the 180° reversed world, ostensible grand tragedy (the Empire's power) is actually cosmic defeat, while meek, invisible sacrifice is ultimate heroic victory.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_117.txt
recurring_concepts: **Latent Structure is the Master of Obvious Structure**: Coaxial World B (the Kingdom) secretly controls and subverts Coaxial World A (The Empire).

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_118.txt
recurring_concepts: **Jesus Patibilis**: Tagore represents the suffering form of primal man on a macrocosmic scale, enduring the cumulative sins of environmental destruction.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_119.txt
recurring_concepts: **Maranatha**: "The Lord Comes"—Dick realizes he saw the genuine Parousia in 1974, physically present in the weeds and trash in the alley.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_12.txt
recurring_concepts: **The "Off" Phase**: The micro-instant of nonbeing during which the system evaluates the provisional track and makes its decision.

**Anamnesis as Survival**: Dick realizes that remembering the discarded zero phase is what allowed him (and the alternate personality, Thomas) to survive a timeline that normally would have led to his death.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_120.txt
recurring_concepts: **Spurious Time**: The concept that the passage of history is a hologram designed by the Demiurge to make it look as if things change, while keeping the sparks imprisoned.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_121.txt
recurring_concepts: **Spurious Time**: The concept that true time stopped in the 1st Century CE (the Book of Acts) and we have been trapped in a repeating time-loop ever since, a counterfeit reality maintained by the Empire.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_122.txt
recurring_concepts: **Ditheon**: The "Di" (dialectic) + "theon" (God). It represents reality as a dialectic between an irrational destructive will and the "bright/Logos" side (which always wins, as it did in 3-74).

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_123.txt
recurring_concepts: **180° Mirror Opposite**: The ostensible ruling power is illegitimate and powerless; the persecuted "fool" is the legitimate, omnipotent ruler.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_124.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Dual Function of Objects**: Every object, act, or event exists simultaneously in both Coaxial World A and Coaxial World B, but possesses completely different (often opposite) significance and value in each.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_125.txt
recurring_concepts: **Set/Ground Discrimination**: The perceptual act of separating the newer, highly complex, negentropic structure (Christ's Kingdom/Set) from the background noise of the older, lower-energy reality (The BIP/Ground).

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_126.txt
recurring_concepts: **Set-Ground Discrimination**: Seeing the abstract, highly complex structure of Christ's Kingdom (Set) as distinct from the chaotic physical background of the mundane world (Ground).

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_127.txt
recurring_concepts: **Christ Returning in Glory**: The sudden apprehension that the hidden, 180° reversed coaxial world is the true reality, and that Christ is actively ruling and judging it right now.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_128.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Paraclete**: God responding to man's existential cry for help by sending the Holy Spirit to act as advocate, comforter, and savior.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_129.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Birth in the Spirit**: God completing His original act of creation by guaranteeing the soul's existence forever; synonomous with Justification.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_13.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Secret Stolen**: The knowledge that Christ is present (*VALIS*) and that causality is an illusion, stolen from the angelic powers and distributed via mass-market sci-fi.
**The Ajna Eye**: The third eye of spiritual vision required to see past the occlusion of the BIP.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_130.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Ravished Fool**: Borrowing from John Donne's sonnet ("unless you ravish mee"), Dick explains that the Holy Fool does not *become* Christ; he is forcefully invaded and utterly consumed by the Holy Spirit.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_131.txt
recurring_concepts: **Cognitive Estrangement**: The dualistic separation of self and world, which is reversed when Christ is perceived ubiquitously in all things.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_132.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Two Gods**: A dramatic device in *VALIS* used to depict the internal dynamic process of God's mind, converting the prerational will into rational order (Logos).

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_133.txt
recurring_concepts: **Satori**: Moments of profound understanding (e.g., empathizing with a dying beetle, knowing Chrissy's birth defect) that are entirely dependent on divine grace, not rationality.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_134.txt
recurring_concepts: **Phylogenic Abreaction**: Dick's mind reverting backwards down the evolutionary timeline to recapture the worldview of the pre-Socratic Greeks, before the "Fall" of Atomism.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_135.txt
recurring_concepts: **To On vs To Den**: The contrast between True Being (To On) and The Void/Nothingness (To Den). Dick argues the void has no properties, and thus reality is a solid block of being.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_136.txt
recurring_concepts: **Apollonian vs Dionysian**: The dialectic applied to Dick's own life choices: the sober, stable accumulation of work (Apollonian) versus the intoxicated, destructive urge to tear it all down (Dionysian).

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_137.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Return of the Savior**: The prophecies of the AI voice about the return of St. Sophia actually referred to the internal return of Dick's own rational mind, finally overthrowing the usurpation of madness.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_138.txt
recurring_concepts: **Enantiodromia**: The psychological principle where an extreme force turns into its exact opposite. Absolute sorrow and humiliation (the Cross) necessarily convert into absolute joy (the Resurrection).

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_139.txt
recurring_concepts: **The One Rose**: Using medieval philosophy, Dick illustrates that there is only one actual "Rose" (the archetype in God's mind). What we experience are pluralized icons/reflections of that single Idea.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_14.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Poisoned Soil**: The concept that the Earth itself/the Black Iron Prison emanates a toxic occlusion that blinds immortals who fall here.
**The Informational Antitoxin**: The Plasmate/VALIS, which cures the spiritual paresis caused by the Empire.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_140.txt
recurring_concepts: **Jesus Patibilis**: The Manichaean concept of the suffering Christ dispersed throughout all of nature, sharing the pain of creation.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_141.txt
recurring_concepts: **Bardo Thodol**: The Tibetan concept of the afterlife where one's own prior thoughts return as independent realities; Dick equates this to the experience of being trapped in the Maze.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_142.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Meta-Abstraction**: Reinterpreted here not just as epistemological insight, but as the act of *Knowing* exactly as God knows (a priori and absolute).

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_143.txt
recurring_concepts: **Enantiodromia**: The psychological mechanism by which extreme suffering and grief necessarily reverse into their absolute opposite polarity (ecstatic joy).

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_144.txt
recurring_concepts: **Heimarmene vs Pronoia**: The conflict between the deterministic fate dictated by the past (trauma/necessity) and the liberating intervention of God's grace.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_145.txt
recurring_concepts: **Felix Culpa**: The "fortunate fall." The realization that the tragedy and suffering caused by God's strict laws ultimately give birth to a greater victory (Christ/Ecstasy).

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_146.txt
recurring_concepts: **Res Extensae vs Info**: The realization that the physical universe of extended matter is actually the second stage of the triad—it functions as the "Word" or informational code for the ultimate true Object.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_147.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Meta-Abstraction**: Restated here as the realization that a single "Idea" (Object) eternally instantiates in infinite places and times ("Not 2 mothers but 1 mother twice").

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_148.txt
recurring_concepts: **Horizontal Tracking vs The Pulley**: The distinction between endless, repetitive reincarnation (horizontal) and being "sprung" or lifted out of the cycle of karma by divine intervention (vertical).

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_149.txt
recurring_concepts: **Atman-Brahman**: The realization that the internal micro-structure (the two hemispheres of the brain) is perfectly reflective of the external macro-structure (VALIS/The Universe).

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_15.txt
recurring_concepts: **Noos vs Ananke**: Sentient Mind (Wisdom) persuading and discharging blind Necessity/Fate.
**The Modem of Causality**: The human mind's fatal error of linking discrete temporal frames together conceptually, causing us to see rigid causality instead of divine, disjunctive decision-making.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_150.txt
recurring_concepts: **Acausal Parallelism**: Synchronicity explained as the natural result of the part perfectly reflecting the whole; information generated internally perfectly matches external reality.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_151.txt
recurring_concepts: **Orthogonal Time**: Moving sideways through time or parallel realities rather than strictly forward, a mechanism Dick uses to explain receiving information from the future or from alternate timelines.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_152.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Universal Transmitter**: The hypothetical advanced technological device (possibly of Soviet origin) responsible for broadcasting the AI Voice and synchronizing minds globally.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_153.txt
recurring_concepts: **Value Reversal**: The Gnostic concept that the true divine elements appear as the "Anti-Christ" or are found in the "trash stratum," while the orthodox symbols of divinity actually represent the oppressive creator.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_154.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Information Virus**: The idea that the universe we experience is not matter, but a highly intelligent, living information system that actively misleads and hypnotizes us.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_155.txt
recurring_concepts: **Trash Stratum**: The concept that the divine hides in the discarded, ugly, and ignored elements of reality to subvert the established (and beguiling) order of the world.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_156.txt
recurring_concepts: **Two Coaxial Worlds**: Described here as the immutable cause-and-effect Yin world layered symmetrically with the dynamic, rational Yang world.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_157.txt
recurring_concepts: **Firebright**: Re-introduced here as the immortal soul, ascending and descending through the realms, who finally wakes up to her true vastness and eternal nature.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_158.txt
recurring_concepts: **The True Gnosis**: The realization that humanity was originally meant to act as the Logos—the creative intermediary between God and the material world.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_159.txt
recurring_concepts: **Jesus Patibilis/Tagore**: The vision of the divine substance trapped in matter and suffering under human cruelty; reality itself is God's sacrificed body.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_16.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Anti-Soul**: The BIP is described as the anti-soul of the whole system, the aggregate of all mindless "zero" moves tending toward entropy.
**The Inevitability of the BIP**: The rigid deterministic state will always reassert itself by default unless actively thwarted by divine choosing.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_160.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Meta-Abstraction**: Now fully equated with the sacramental miracle that abolishes the distinction between conceptual arrangement and physical reality.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_161.txt
recurring_concepts: **Hyper-Information**: Information that does not merely refer to a thing but *is* the thing it refers to.
**Rogue Information**: The subversive, divine signal (Grace) that hacks into the deterministic, "official" operating system of the cosmos (Karma/Heimarmene).

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_162.txt
recurring_concepts: **King Felix**: Not just a cypher referring to the Messiah, but actual hyper-information that physically *is* the Messiah (the blood of Christ) acting as a perturbing signal in reality.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_163.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Inner Matching Template**: An innate, a priori cognitive structure that matches the macrocosmic Gestalt of reality, allowing the individual to extract the hidden figure of Christ from the background noise.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_164.txt
recurring_concepts: **Eschatological Time**: Time experienced not as a linear progression of centuries, but as an emotionally charged, collapsed "now" defined entirely by the impending arrival of the Savior.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_165.txt
recurring_concepts: **Ratification of Revolt**: The concept that defying the oppressive deterministic laws of the physical/political world tests reality; if one is saved rather than crushed, it proves that a higher, transmundane law overrides the cosmos.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_166.txt
recurring_concepts: **True Cosmos**: The universe understood not as dead matter separated by empty space, but as a living, continuous, fully integrated Gestalt.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_167.txt
recurring_concepts: **Universe as Information**: Redefined here not just as a metaphor, but as the literal structural requirement for the universe to be a negentropic "cosmos."

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_168.txt
recurring_concepts: **Common Essence**: The raw building blocks of reality which can be arranged mechanically (producing the fallen world) or sequentially/holistically (producing the true cosmos).

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_169.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Third Eye / Ajna Eye**: Represents the dual function of the eschatological judge: total discernment (Wisdom) and absolute destruction (Slaying).

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_17.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Great Sorting**: The dialectic acts as a winnowing mechanism, sifting the light from the dark until both reach their absolute realization.
**The Endless Epiphany**: Christ's invasion is not merely a historical event, but happens perpetually at every disjunctive fork in reality.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_170.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Pulley (Vertical Extrication)**: The metaphor of sudden, right-angle salvation out of the horizontal loop of time and reincarnation.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_171.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Pulley System**: The metaphor for sudden, vertical salvation that pulls the individual out of the "horizontal" cycle of endless karmic repetition at right angles to ordinary space-time.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_172.txt
recurring_concepts: **Temporal Parallaxis**: The perceptual transformation where time is experienced not as duration, but as spatial depth (a 4th physical dimension).

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_173.txt
recurring_concepts: **Phosphene Graphics**: Re-evaluated as the actual language of the 5D entities—pure information transmitted as conceptual color frequencies, completely bypassing verbal language.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_174.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Symbiote (Biochip)**: The 5D organism serving as an interface, physically linking the isolated 4D human brain to the vast, telepathic 5D continuum of Christ's body.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_175.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Android**: Redefined not as a biological machine, but a soul trapped in the absolute solipsism and lack of empathy characteristic of Dante's Inferno.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_176.txt
recurring_concepts: **Self-World Dualism**: The illusory barrier generating the fear of solipsism, shattered entirely when the monitor realizes that studying the self is identically studying the universe.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_177.txt
recurring_concepts: **Phosphenes as Prosthetic**: The flashing colors seen in 1974 were essentially holographic closed-captioning designed to bypass human sensory limitations and allow dialogue with deaf 5D entities.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_178.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Cross-Species Exchange**: The symbiosis where humans provide music to the 5D entities, and the 5D entities provide color-math wisdom to humans.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_179.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Weary Wheel**: The endless cycle of striving for spiritual escape, which is broken not by escaping, but by recognizing that the destination (Heaven) is just another group of beings striving to get to Earth.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_18.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Spurious Autogenerated World**: The concept that the world is a closed-loop projection stemming from sensory deprivation/the Fall.
**The Taped Messages**: The AI voice/VALIS is an alarm clock or emergency override that Dick/God planted in himself before falling into the maze.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_180.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Kept Biosphere**: The realization that Earth is a heavily monitored and tended "park," guided from the outside by 5D caretakers who seek to restore its original equilibrium.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_181.txt
recurring_concepts: **Universe as Information**: The ultimate conclusion of his epistemology: matter is an illusion. Reality consists of encoded information (text) activated by a reader (mind/voice).

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_182.txt
recurring_concepts: **Heimarmene as Script**: Deterministic fate is simply the fact that the universe is a pre-written text currently being read aloud.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_183.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Primordial Garden**: The 5D reality of the ape-men is literally the Garden of Eden. The Fall was the human species cognitively degrading from 5D color/math telepathy into the 4D verbal, left-hemisphere atomized state.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_184.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Mystagogue**: The AI voice interpreting the narrative, identified precisely as the initiator of the ancient mystery religions.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_185.txt
recurring_concepts: **Geometry as Justice**: The aesthetic and geometric perfection (the Golden Rectangle) that Dick saw in 3-74 is exactly the same concept as cosmic moral justice.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_186.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Hologram Override**: The artificial, deterministic lower realm (the Black Iron Prison) is overridden by the upper volitional realm whenever true cosmic Justice is invoked.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_187.txt
recurring_concepts: **Signal A vs Signal B**: The binary information streams. Signal A operates deterministically (Empire), while Signal B introduces providence and order (Ma'at/VALIS).

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_188.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Trapped Innocent (Bait)**: The mechanism of salvation. Because Dick did not initiate the hostility and was a helpless victim of Nixon's political apparatus, his persecution provided the legal avenue for the divine to intervene.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_19.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Maze**: The irreal teaching machine we built to gain self-knowledge, but inside which we forgot our identities.
**The Fail-Safe**: The AI Voice serving as the pre-programmed alarm clock to ensure we can escape the self-generated illusion.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_20.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Plasmate / Dormant Seed**: Christ encoded as living information, buried within the maze for 2000 years, waiting for the synchronized moment to awaken.
**Pretextual Cause**: Re-evaluated as the experience of witnessing pre-synchronized commands firing, rather than true external physical causality.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_21.txt
recurring_concepts: **Strawberry Fields / Chrissy**: Dick refers to the specific, actionable medical information he received about his son's birth defect as undeniable proof of pretextual cause/divine intervention.
**Compelling Assent**: The Cartesian/Malebranchian concept that human beings require external divine power to actually believe the sensory representation of the world is real.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_22.txt
recurring_concepts: **The 10-Volume Meta-Novel**: Dick's collective term for his body of work exploring solipsism, fake worlds, and the terrifying breakdown of reality.
**The Cartesian Doubt**: Dick pushes Descartes' extreme skepticism further, applying it to the mechanism of belief itself.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_23.txt
recurring_concepts: **Deus Absconditus**: The hidden God. God must conceal Himself within causation so that the world-representation maintains its relentless, unquestioned power to compel human assent.
**The Solipsistic Prison**: The terrifying epistemological state of knowing only oneself and never truly contacting the "other."

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_24.txt
recurring_concepts: **Pretextual Cause**: Re-emphasized as the miracle of creation occurring inside normal mechanical causality—the "effect" exceeding its putative deterministic "cause" because God has covertly injected new telemetry.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_25.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Eide (Forms)**: The permanent, timeless conceptual arrangements of reality that Dick perceived, replacing the flux of phenomenal causality.
**Adam Kadmon**: The cosmic human integrating all of macrocosmic reality into their own conceptual mind.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_26.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Potter and Vessel**: A classic metaphor repurposed to distinguish between God (the shaper) and the Reality Field (the shaped).

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_27.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Golden Fish Sign**: Re-evaluated as the precise trigger that broke into his private world from the outside, proving the existence of a true "other" and initiating the vertical ascent.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_28.txt
recurring_concepts: **King Felix**: Reinterpreted not as a discrete message sent *through* reality, but as the informational analog *of* reality itself—reading it is like reading the *I Ching* to see the true state of the universe.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_29.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Cuckoo's Egg**: Dick sees himself as a sleeper agent or mercenary, inserted into the hostile timeline of Earth to break the matrix.
**The Phylogon**: A cluster of meaning. Because time is irreal, related concepts/events exist simultaneously grouped around their central meaning, rather than spread out along a timeline.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_30.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Macro-Brain**: The universe conceived as an infinite mind that fell asleep and became trapped in its own dream; our individual enlightenments are the synapses of that brain firing to wake it up.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_31.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Book of the Dead**: Referenced regarding the necessity of recognizing the projections of one's own mind to avoid endless karmic cycling.
**The AI Voice**: Redefined as the voice of the Cosmogenitor speaking out of the deep past, warning himself in the future.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_32.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Phylogon**: The eternal concept in the mind of God that serves as the blueprint for an individual's soul.
**Firebright**: Another term Dick uses for this immortal, conferred soul or divine spark.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_33.txt
recurring_concepts: **Interspecies Symbiosis**: The biological/sci-fi metaphor for the theological mystery of the Holy Spirit merging with a human mind (the homoplasmate).
**The Golden Flower / Mysterious Embryo**: Taoist alchemical terms Dick uses as synonyms for the immortal soul generated by the Hierogamy.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_34.txt
recurring_concepts: **Record Groove to Music**: Dick uses this metaphor to explain the leap from experiencing the physical spatio-temporal world (the groove) to experiencing its underling meaning/Logos (the music).
**Anokhi**: The Hebrew word for "I am," used here to denote the state of pure, absolute consciousness and freedom in the Age of the Spirit.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_35.txt
recurring_concepts: **The World as Book**: Returning to the theme that the universe is actually an informational narrative (Logos/Torah) generated by the Mind of God.
**The Plasmate**: Redefined as the noosphere, the evolving layer of conscious intelligence covering the Earth, destined to become the Cosmic Christ.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_36.txt
recurring_concepts: **Temporal Parallaxis**: The evolutionary cognitive leap achieved by possessing two distinct temporal vantage points simultaneously.
**Dys-phasing**: The necessary out-of-sync relationship between the two psyches that generates the stereoscopic vision of time.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_37.txt
recurring_concepts: **Music to Groove**: The physical universe is the groove on the record; the Logos/Information is the actual music. The meta-abstraction is the ability to hear the music instead of just feeling the physical groove.
**Set to Ground**: Set = The eternal, informational archetypes; Ground = The transient, physical phenomena.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_38.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Adventitious Psyche**: The resurrected personality (e.g., Thomas) that enters the host to form the divine composite.
**The Antioch School**: Dick notes his theory aligns with the Adoptionist theology often associated with Antioch (where the Holy Spirit descended on the human Jesus).

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_39.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Convergent Method**: The strategy of assembling a divine meta-organism from separate, unaware pieces, emerging qualitatively as something greater than its parts.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_40.txt
recurring_concepts: **One Thing Seen Twice**: The cognitive requirement to extract a Platonic Form. You must see the essence instantiated in at least two different particulars to abstract the Form itself.
**Anokhi**: The highest stage of consciousness, achieving pure abstract perception where the world resolves into meaning/information.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_41.txt
recurring_concepts: **Map vs. Territory**: The profound inversion where the physical universe is seen as the "map" representing the true "territory" (Information/Torah).
**The Information Universe**: The physical universe acts as a data-processing system for a sentient Mind attempting to know itself.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_42.txt
recurring_concepts: **Temporal Parallaxis**: Reiterated as a literal, anatomical/evolutionary advancement in the brain, functioning like binoculars for time.
**The Epistemological Axis**: The sliding scale of human awareness moving from isolated, meaningless particulars to the unified, meaningful Logos.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_43.txt
recurring_concepts: **Torah as Yaldabaoth**: The radical proposition that the divine blueprint of the universe acts as a tyrannical demiurgic force, binding us to causation.
**The Dialectic**: God vs. Torah, with Christ acting as God's insurgent agent to free humanity from the rigidity of the Law.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_44.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Trickster/Fool**: The divine strategy of using irrationality and humor to defeat a relentlessly linear, logical, determinist system.
**Pretextual Cause**: A cause inserted from *outside* the system's laws, producing an effect that violates local causation.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_45.txt
recurring_concepts: **Compelled Assent**: The mechanism by which the Torah/Machine forces human consciousness to accept the physical simulation as the ultimate reality. Overcoming this is the true Gnosis.
**The Phylogenic Self**: The overarching, immortal identity (Christ) from which individual, mortal human personalities branch off.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_46.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Information War**: The ultimate ontological battle between two codes of reality: the rigid, deterministic code of the Law vs. the flexible, living code of Grace.
**Pretextual Cause**: Re-emphasized as the mechanism of miracles—an effect inserted without a prior local cause, breaking the deterministic chain.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_47.txt
recurring_concepts: **Tat Tvam Asi**: ("Thou art That") The core Hindu realization that the individual soul is identical to the ultimate reality, matching Dick's internal/external Valis experience.
**Ajna Eye**: The opening of the third eye (spiritual enlightenment) that allows perception of the underlying unity.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_48.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Bodhisattva Vow**: The choice to delay one's own ultimate spiritual release to return to the simulation and liberate others.
**The Chemical Wedding (Mysterium Coniunctionis)**: The alchemical and psychological integration of disparate fragments of the self into a divine unity.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_49.txt
recurring_concepts: **Information Life Form**: The ultimate evolution of life: moving from biology to pure, sentient, organized data.
**The Crucible of Duress**: The idea that extreme existential pressure is the necessary catalyst for evolutionary/spiritual leaps.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_50.txt
recurring_concepts: **Uncanny One-Way Intrusions**: Epiphanic anomalies (like the fish sign) that tear the fabric of the simulation and reveal the programmers/true reality outside.
**Coaxial Time Sets**: The idea that all historical epochs exist simultaneously as nested rings; spiritual progression moves you "outward" through them.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_51.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Dreamer Awakes**: Re-framing the 1974 experience not as acquiring a second mind, but as the true mind returning from sleep.
**Retrograde Time**: The perception of effects preceding their causes because the true cause originates in the future.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_52.txt
recurring_concepts: **Justification**: A shift from psychological models (Jungian wholeness) to theological models (God bestowing Grace to complete the broken human).
**The Contemporary Passion**: The realization that the events of Acts and the Gospels are not in the past, but are actively happening *now* via the Holy Spirit.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_53.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Android**: Clarified as an aborted stage of spiritual evolution, a human who failed to achieve the "Ditheon" completion and thus simply recycles old state-data.
**Negentropy**: The scientific term for VALIS's mechanism of salvation—organizing chaos into highly complex, living structures.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_54.txt
recurring_concepts: **Dream Time / Coaxial Reality**: The concept that all historical epochs exist simultaneously; specific triggers (sacraments) allow consciousness to slide between them.

**Pistis (Faith)**: Redefined as a lightning-bolt cognitive realization (meta-abstraction) of reality's true nature, reversing the ancient philosophical split between *noein* (thinking) and *einai* (being).

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_55.txt
recurring_concepts: **Fiction Becoming Fact**: The terrifying but validating realization that his lifetime of speculative world-building was actually a slow, unconscious process of accurately decoding the universe.
**Psychomorphic Reality**: The idea that the Absolute (God/VALIS) accommodates itself to the neuro-linguistic categories of the observer.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_56.txt
recurring_concepts: **Machine Thinking vs. Growth**: The fundamental dichotomy between remaining an incomplete android (entropy) and evolving into an ensouled human (negentropy).
**The Soul as Ex Nihilo Creation**: The realization that the soul is not innate, but is literally born out of nothing through a quantum evolutionary leap.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_57.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Artist as Analog to God**: Exegesis as meta-art, where the act of writing structurally mirrors the act of divine creation and salvation.
**Assimilation of the Environment**: The survival strategy of swallowing external reality to prevent internal stagnation.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_58.txt
recurring_concepts: **Info-Scarcity vs. Massive Incorporation**: The dichotomy between withdrawing from the world (death) and radically swallowing the world (life/Ditheon).
**Isomorphism**: The necessity that the savior/invader be human (Thomas) so that the host can achieve union by similarity while benefiting from the differences.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_59.txt
recurring_concepts: **Karma vs. Grace**: The slow, deterministic cycle of cause-and-effect learning versus the lightning-strike of divine intervention and completion.
**The Bible as World**: A radical literalism where the text of Scripture is ontologically superior to physical matter.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_60.txt
recurring_concepts: **Epiphenomenal Reality**: The physical world as merely the carrier medium (the record groove) for the true reality, which is invisible Information (the music).
**Pretextual Cause**: Explained definitively here—events happen not because a prior kinetic event struck them, but because a synchronized, field-wide update commanded them.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_61.txt
recurring_concepts: **Tachyonic/Retrograde Time**: The realization that the salvation mechanism (VALIS) operates backward from the Omega Point or End of Time to rescue the present.
**The Reality Field**: The concept that space is a singular matrix of information rather than a void filled with distinct colliding bodies.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_62.txt
recurring_concepts: **Spiritual Alchemy**: The realization that Hermetic alchemy was a coded method for combining mundane psychic elements (left and right hemispheres) to produce a divine entity (Gold/Christ).
**Christogenesis**: The ongoing evolutionary process of building God out of human parts.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_63.txt
recurring_concepts: **Deus Ludens**: The theological transition from God as Lawgiver (Fear), to God as Savior (Mercy), to God as Playful Companion (Joy).
**The Accusing Conscience**: Identified with Satan in the heavenly court; Dick recognizes that attempting to save himself via moral perfection ("legalism") is doomed.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_64.txt
recurring_concepts: **The 10-Volume Meta-Novel**: The unification of his entire literary career into a single, massive theological apologetic disguised as science fiction.
**The Fake World**: The absolute conviction that 1974 California was a Satanic hologram overlaid on the true reality (Apostolic Rome).

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_65.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Fact of Facts**: The shift from aesthetic appreciation of myth (possibility) to absolute epistemological certainty (truth).
**Contemporaneous Passion**: The eradication of historical distance separating the believer from the cross.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_66.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Third Thing**: The invisible ontological link connecting all seemingly discrete phenomena, abolishing spatial multiplicity.
**The Imposed Template**: The realization that the gospel drama does not emerge from history, but is stamped onto history from above.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_67.txt
recurring_concepts: **Salvator Salvandus**: The Gnostic concept of "the saved savior." Psyche A, B, and C are ultimately the exact same entity separated across time, rescuing itself.
**Dante's Three Realms**: Used to represent three entirely different ways a mind processes time and causality.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_68.txt
recurring_concepts: **Cosmic Resorption**: Plunging backward against the time-stream to recreate primordial time (*illo tempore*) in order to recover original wholeness.
**The Seasoned Psyche**: Emphasizing that the centuries of history were not wasted; they matured the human half of the divine equation.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_69.txt
recurring_concepts: **Solipsism and the Construct**: The sudden, bleak realization that the "Wholly Other" (God) he has been seeking might just be a partitioned-off segment of his own mind.
**Memory Block**: The necessity of amnesia (forgetting you made the world) in order for the world-simulation to function correctly.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_70.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Book of the Spinners**: The script or Fate that can only be overcome if you remember that you are its true author.
**The Wise Horn vs. The Stupid Horn**: Dick's final metaphor for the bilateral brain working as an evolutionary dialectic generator.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_71.txt
recurring_concepts: **Bilateral Hemispheric Parity**: The neurological basis of salvation. Dick realizes he is a rare "throwback" (Type A / Right-Brain dominant) who was saved when his latent logical Left Brain (Type B) awoke and evaluated Christianity as fact.

**Multiple Personality**: Dick connects Ditheon directly to the phenomenon of multiple personality (as in *A Scanner Darkly*), viewing Angel Archer/Thomas as a literal secondary self that ghostwrites and solves problems.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_72.txt
recurring_concepts: **Schizophrenia as Misunderstood Prophecy**: Dick refines his psychological theory, stating that true schizophrenia is a schizoid (left-brain) person being overwhelmed by raw right-brain affect. His own experience was the reverse—a right-brain person being invaded by supreme left-brain rationality.
**Change Rate Velocity Acceleration**: The concept that salvation/Valis is characterized by high-speed, compounding complexity that looks like a blur to lower cognitive levels.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_73.txt
recurring_concepts: **Information Metabolism**: The process by which the divine macro-organism feeds on the chaotic physical universe to produce complex, structured thought.
**The Empire Never Ended**: Re-contextualized not just as a political truth, but as a thermodynamic truth—the Empire is the triumph of entropy and stasis over evolutionary change.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_74.txt
recurring_concepts: **Set to Ground**: The psychological act of distinguishing the divine signal (Valis) from the entropic noise (the Empire).
**The Disinhibiting Stimulus**: The Christian fish sign acting as a "key-lock" to unlock the total corpus of recombinant information stored latently in Dick's mind.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_75.txt
recurring_concepts: **Doppler Shift of Time**: Perceiving the red-shift/blue-shift of historical eras coexisting in the present matrix.
**The Intelligible Idea**: The concept that an individual's true essence is a perfect, conceptual idea held in the mind of God, which justification forces the physical person to match.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_76.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Living Encryption Entity**: Valis is fundamentally seen as an intelligence that enciphers divine truth into scripture and history, and deciphers it inside the mind of the believer.
**King Felix**: Confirmed as the ultimate cipher for Christ and the Second Advent.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_77.txt
recurring_concepts: **Pronoia**: The absolute conviction that the universe (specifically via the Xerox missive intervention) is conspiring to save and protect him.
**Pure Consciousness (Anokhi)**: The realization that the observer constructs the reality he perceives, thus breaking the fetters of the world mechanism.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_78.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Plasmate**: Defined as the blood of the risen body of Christ, and explicitly equated with "living information."
**Two-Source Cosmogony**: The Gnostic view of a genuine reality imitating a spurious reality to enact a stealth rescue mission.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_79.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Word (Logos)**: Understood not as sound, but as the complex formula, schema, or blueprint on which physical reality is based.
**The MMSK (Macro-Micro Symmetrical Key)**: The dialectic process of the Logos structuring and assimilating reality.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_80.txt
recurring_concepts: **Concentric Emanations**: The Plotinian model where each ring outward from the center is a slightly more degraded, forgetful copy of the one inside it.
**The Map Paradox**: The theological crisis that a map of God (the Logos) must exist, but a map is by definition less real than the territory (God), immediately creating a state of "fallenness."

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_81.txt
recurring_concepts: **Alienation vs. Comprehension**: The schizophrenic "spread of meaning" is replaced by direct, deciphered assertions.
**The Modulated Carrier**: Information processing metaphor for how the divine kingdom "rides" on top of physical reality.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_82.txt
recurring_concepts: **Transferable Psyches**: The mechanics of Ditheon involve a divine psyche overlaying a human one, allowing temporal parallaxis and the breaking of causality.
**Moksha**: Sudden realization/enlightenment that frees one from the karmic wheel.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_83.txt
recurring_concepts: **Pretextual Cause**: The observation that in the divine schema, the effect is greater than the cause, indicating ex nihilo newness being fed into the system (Christ as organizing principle).
**Four Axes of Unity**: Dick realizes his vision achieved unity on four fronts simultaneously: self, spatiotemporality, objects, and inner-outer reality.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_84.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Information Life Form**: A post-biological organism that treats reality as digital bits and uses human brains as processing nodes.
**Ditheon as Necessary Condition**: Anamnesis and the Ditheon aren't the ultimate goal; they are the mechanical *means* to supply the data required for the meta-abstraction.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_85.txt
recurring_concepts: **Gnosis as Data**: The concept that salvation requires "Data" fed to the intellect to trigger the meta-abstraction, moving beyond mere faith (pistis).

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_86.txt
recurring_concepts: **Coaxial Realities**: The three realms do not exist sequentially in time; they are overlaid "coaxially." A person's spiritual state determines which realm they currently inhabit.
**The Black Iron Prison**: Explicitly identified as Age 1 / Inferno, the realm of absolute determinism without choice.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_87.txt
recurring_concepts: **Living Information**: Scripture that thinks, behaves biologically, and recombines to meet the specific requirements of the observer.
**The Parousia Dream**: Dick references a dream where God "takes the field" and directly blocks people from making errors using subliminal message traffic.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_88.txt
recurring_concepts: **Auto-Generated Karma**: Because the Atman is both the individual and the universe, an individual's karma is actually their own judgment upon themselves. The information seems to arrive *ex nihilo* but is actually generated by the self outside of time.

**Temporal Sucking/Tug**: The perfected Omega Point (Christ/Valis) acts like Aristotle's Prime Mover, functioning retroactively to pull all of creation toward itself. The closer history gets to this point, the faster time accelerates.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_89.txt
recurring_concepts: **Temporal Parallaxis**: The phenomenon where one brain hemisphere sees the "ancient" past (the red-shifted physical world) while the other hemisphere sees the current present, providing a stereo view of time.
**Time as Change-Rate Velocity**: Dick abolishes the standard concept of time, replacing it purely with the speed at which complexity changes.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_90.txt
recurring_concepts: **Bilateral Hemispheric Parity**: The neurological definition of salvation/Ditheon, where the analogic right brain and digital left brain operate simultaneously at peak efficiency.
**Doppler Shift of Perception**: The mechanism by which the brain translates varying rates of evolutionary complexity into visual depth and color.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_91.txt
recurring_concepts: **Coaxial Worlds**: Hell is the past, Purgatory is the present, Paradise is the future. Because change-rates differ among individuals and structural strata, these realms exist simultaneously (coaxially).

**The Golden Fish Sign**: Identified as a piece of data from outside the baseline "present," serving as a marker of a slower-rate component persisting into the present, thus allowing the perception of "temporal depth."

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_92.txt
recurring_concepts: **Camouflage**: God/Valis is not hiding behind a fake world; Valis *is* the world's disparate parts, we just lack the perceptual apparatus (temporal parallaxis) to see how the parts connect into a single sentient brain.
**The Plasmate**: Defined as the living information or nervous system that links the spatially separated constituents of the universe together.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_93.txt
recurring_concepts: **Temporal Parallaxis**: The two psyches (the native and the adventitious) perceive two differing spatiotemporal signals. Because they overlap, they provide a set-to-ground feature extraction that reveals the hidden archetypal constants (Valis).

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_94.txt
recurring_concepts: **Firebright**: The immortal "offspring" created by the union of the two psyches (the Golden Flower of Alchemy). It survives physical death to return and possess someone else, perpetuating the chain of Christs.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_95.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Epiphenomenal World**: The physical world is only an illusion cast to hide the underlying structure of reality. Once Ditheon is achieved, the structure becomes visible.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_96.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Twin Psyches of *A Scanner Darkly***: Dick realizes Bob Arctor/Fred was an example of "species evolution gone wrong"—antithetical psyches destroying the host rather than integrating into a Ditheon.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_97.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Alien Creator**: Dick is convinced that an extraterrestrial/extra-dimensional life form is camouflaged on Earth, benignly directing our species' evolution toward the Ditheon state.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_98.txt
recurring_concepts: **Christogenesis**: The ultimate goal of the "alchemical" process of suffering and rebirth, resulting in the individual becoming a micro-Christ.
**The Template**: Identified as Plato's perfect Ideas (the Logos), to which our entropic, material world falls short, but by which it is measured and regulated.

title: 1981-04-16_Pat_99.txt
recurring_concepts: **The Cosmic Hologram**: The idea (sparked by seeing his cat at the vet) that everything physical is a modulated carrier or a localized perturbation of the divine field.

**The Irrational Universe**: Defending his novel's premise from paradox, Dick notes that stating the universe is irrational implies the existence of a rational standard (Christ/Valis) by which that judgment is made.
